---
title: "{{< fa person-chalkboard >}} Courses"
echo: false
# jupyter: python3
section-divs: false
---

**Stuff I teach or taught**

### [<i class="bi bi-cloud-rain-fill"></i> Surface Hydrology](/surface-hydrology){target="_blank"}

### [{{< iconify carbon agriculture-analytics >}} Agrotech Lab](https://agrotech-lab.github.io){target="_blank"}

### [{{< iconify bi clock-history >}} Time Series Analysis](/time-series){target="_blank"}

### [{{< iconify whh solarsystem >}} Physics 1](/physics1){target="_blank"} (2018--2022)

</br>

**Stuff I'm learning myself **

### [{{< iconify foundation graph-bar >}} Statistics and ML](/statistics){target="_blank"}

### [{{< iconify fa6-solid shapes >}} Mishmash of topics](/mishmash){target="_blank"}

</br>

**Admin stuff, related to teaching**

### [{{< fa seedling >}} Environmental Quality MSc Program](/courses/environment){target="_blank"}


</br></br>

<div class="alert alert-success">
  True science teaches, above all, to doubt and to be ignorant.  
  <strong>— Miguel de Unamuno</strong>
</div>
